initial_program:
count(C) = #count{ R : input(R, _, C) }.
maxCount = #max{ C : count(C) }.
maxColour = #min{ C : count(C) = maxCount, C != 0 }.
n_rows(N) = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(N) = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
rows_with_max(R) :- input(R, _, maxColour).
r0 = #min{ R : rows_with_max(R) }.
r2 = #max{ R : rows_with_max(R) }.
r1 = #min{ R : R > r0 }.
col_with_max(C) :- input(_, C, maxColour).
c0 = #min{ C : col_with_max(C) }.
c2 = #max{ C : col_with_max(C) }.
c1 = #min{ C : C > c0 }.
output(r0, c0, 0).
output(r0, c1, 0).
output(r0, c2, 0).
output(r1, c0, 0).
output(r1, c2, 0).
output(r2, c0, 0).
output(r2, c1, 0).
output(r2, c2, 0).
output(r0, c0, maxColour) :- input(r0, c0, maxColour).
output(r0, c1, maxColour) :- input(r0, c1, maxColour).
output(r0, c2, maxColour) :- input(r0, c2, maxColour).
output(r1, c0, maxColour) :- input(r1, c0, maxColour).
output(r1, c2, maxColour) :- input(r1, c2, maxColour).
output(r2, c0, maxColour) :- input(r2, c0, maxColour).
output(r2, c1, maxColour) :- input(r2, c1, maxColour).
output(r2, c2, maxColour) :- input(r2, c2, maxColour).
output(r1, c1, maxColour) :- true.
:- output(r0, c0, 0), input(r0, c0, maxColour).
:- output(r0, c1, 0), input(r0, c1, maxColour).
:- output(r0, c2, 0), input(r0, c2, maxColour).
:- output(r1, c0, 0), input(r1, c0, maxColour).
:- output(r1, c2, 0), input(r1, c2, maxColour).
:- output(r2, c0, 0), input(r2, c0, maxColour).
:- output(r2, c1, 0), input(r2, c1, maxColour).
:- output(r2, c2, 0), input(r2, c2, maxColour).
:- not output(r1, c1, 0).
